MINI MINUTES: Judge Lynn O'Malley-Taylor; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 640 Clay LLC is present. Represented by Tony Brett-Kelly.
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendant Darien Thompson-Black is present.
Attorney Kevin Dwight appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of DEC-03-2018 is vacated. (501)
